description:
Backlog Expedition is a meta game where a viking sets out on an expedition to an archipelago.
In order to slay monsters and open chests to grab their loot,
the player has to complete objectives in their backlog of games/movies/series etc.

v1.0.0.description:
## The first release includes
- Up to 400 custom location possible
- 3 types of custom locations. (Backlog, Limited and Repeatable) 
- Backlog games will each create their own island, while the Limited and Repeatable locations will appear randomly on each island.
- Option to pick how many treasures are required to goal.
- Option to pick how many locations each island will have. (If a Backlog game is bigger, it will go over though)

## Learn more about this AP-world
- [Setup guide](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md)
- [Info](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/en_Backlog%20Expedition.md)
v1.0.0.title: First Release of Backlog Expedition APWorld

v1.1.0.description:
## This version adds
Option to add prioritized locations 
- Will be prioritized over other locations except backlog locations
- Can be used for a full shuffle mode, if backlog locations are left out of the YAML

Option to pick amount of Islands
- This allows for shuffled Islands that do not depend on a backlog game
- Shuffled islands will fill up to the amount of Locations per Island defined in the YAML
- Getting the Treasure of a shuffled Island requires checking all locations within that island

## Notes about this version
Compatible with v.1.0.0 of the game

Known bugs:
- If there are no repeatable locations and your world includes shuffled islands, the generation will fail if not enough other locations are present
- If your number of islands equal the number of treasures required to goal, the generation will fail.

## Learn more about this AP-world
- [Setup guide](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md)
- [Info](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/en_Backlog%20Expedition.md)
v1.1.0.title: Backlog Expedition APWorld Feature Update

v1.1.2.description:

- Fixed a bug where every player of BEx would have a shared hint_data variable
- Fixed a bug where the generation would crash if a player had more locations in a backlog game than stated in Locations per Island

Compatible with v.1.0.0 of the game

v1.2.1.description:
## New in this version
- Added support for drawing a random selection of backlog games
- Changed the way backlog games are added, to be more streamlined
- Added better descriptions to options
- Added error handling, that will now issue warnings when numbers are off during generation

## Notes about this version
- Compatible with v.2.0.0 of the game

## Learn more about this AP-world
- [Setup guide](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md)
- [Info](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/en_Backlog%20Expedition.md)
v1.2.1.title: Backlog Expedition APWorld v1.2.1

v3.0.0.description:
## New in this version
This new update brings the support for even more islands, as well as a variety of new advanced options that allow for more customization on your raid. 

Previously i would do a release on both the game's github and the AP World's github, but considering some of the new changes, i will only be doing releases on this page going forward. This is also the reason why this version is called 3.0.

## New in the AP World
- Added support for up to 30 islands and 25 locations per island.
- Included Islands in your world will now be entirely random when Random Island Order is toggled.
- Added option for Random Island Order.
  - Will allow you to have your islands be logically unlocked in the order they are shown in your home menu, instead of in any order, like usually.
- Added option for Forcing Starting Island Content.
  - Will allow you to set what backlog game you want to appear in your very first island!
- Added option for customizing the Hint Shop Cost.
  - Will allow you to set the percentage of your worlds trash you will need to purchase a hint.
  - Will also allow you to completely disable the Hint Shop in case you don't want it or your host doesn't allow it.

## New in the Web version of BEx
- New pop-ups for when treasures are found or the slot is goaled.
- Fix to the Hint Shop cost, as well as removing it entirely when set to 0 in your options.
- Updated to work with the new changes in the AP World.
- This version of the Web application is fully backwards compatible with previous versions of the APWorld, so you can keep playing your slots!
- You can still access the page [here](https://www.bex-ap.com/)

## The Console version
- With this new update, I will unfortunately be discontinuing the support for the Console version of BEx. This means that from this version of the APWorld, and moving forward, you will not be able to use the Console version of BEx.

## Learn more about Backlog Expedition
- [Setup guide](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md)
- [Info](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/en_Backlog%20Expedition.md)
v3.0.0.title: Backlog Expedition AP World v3.0.0
